validation_mode: real direct multimodal perception + local Graph execution + focused pytest
external_limitations: The supplied local fixture paths are not accepted by the multimodal endpoint; base64 attachment execution is required for real perception.
The local tool registry does not register smart_search, so chart retrieval degrades to metadata-only in the local Graph trace.
Browser-backed retrieval was interrupted after repeated external page waits; no browser result is represented as verified evidence.
A dense screenshot may require the generic center-detail crop; the real crop pass recovered both affected ship names, but local Graph ship-tool availability remains limited.

cases.fixture: test/image/image01-这个在全球海图里是什么意思.png

real_perception.summary: 用户咨询截图中红色圆形中心带黑点的符号在全球海图中的含义

evidence: visual: red circular symbol with central black point
cases.score: partial: perception and route pass; local chart retrieval unavailable
failure_items: No verified chart legend source in this local run
cases.before_response: 未归档可复放的旧版生成回复；已知旧链路会将图片转写后交给普通 Agent。
cases.after_response: 仅确认红色圆形和中心黑点；无权威图例时不确认符号含义，并请求图例或图层细节。

cases.fixture: test/image/image02-图上紫色的波浪线是指的什么.png
evidence: user text identifies purple wavy line as target
cases.score: partial: route pass; visual feature extraction low confidence
failure_items: Needs accessible chart legend or a higher-detail image
cases.before_response: 未归档可复放的旧版生成回复；线状符号没有专项处理。
cases.after_response: 确认用户指向紫色波浪线；低置信时请求更清晰区域或图例，不猜测符号含义。

cases.fixture: test/image/image03-图中的小圈圈是什么意思？.png

real_perception.recognized_text: HiFleet map UI and ship/event labels detected
real_perception.summary: 用户咨询当前HiFleet海图界面上显示的小空心圆圈的含义

evidence: visual: repeated hollow circles overlaying a map
cases.score: partial: scenario corrected to chart symbol based on user goal; retrieval unavailable
failure_items: Meaning cannot be verified without layer/legend evidence
cases.before_response: 未归档可复放的旧版生成回复；UI OCR 容易覆盖用户的真实问题。
cases.after_response: 以小圈圈含义为目标；无图层或图例证据时不固定解释为锚地。

cases.fixture: test/image/image-04请问这个平均航速，是否包含停航时段、进出港时间？.png
evidence: visual/ocr: screenshot values and time range
cases.score: partial: extraction and route pass; product rule intentionally not inferred
failure_items: Whether stopped/port time is included remains unverified
cases.before_response: 未归档可复放的旧版回复；初次本地 trace 曾按弱 FAQ 推导产品口径，现作为回归缺陷记录。
cases.after_response: 只确认截图中的 9.73 kn、4201 海里和时间范围；无官方产品定义时明确不能确认停航或进出港是否计入。

latest_direct_graph.final_answer_summary: 仅确认截图显示值与区间；无已验证产品定义时不确认停航、锚泊、静止或进出港低速是否计入。
latest_direct_graph.note: Official-looking search summaries are recorded as unverified until local product knowledge or browser body verification proves the claim.

incident packet: no write tools called

cases.after_response: 创建只读 IncidentPacket，逐船解析并标记用户陈述；不调用任何写工具。

latest_direct_graph.note: Tool-returned current status differs from the screenshot historical update time; no backend root-cause claim is made.
